---
title: "Bizard 技能库"
subtitle: "面向生物医学研究的 AI 就绪可视化技能"
author: "Bizard 团队"
date: "2026-03-20"
from: markdown+emoji
---

## 什么是 Bizard 技能？ :brain:

**Bizard 技能** 是一个 AI 技能包，可以让你的 AI 助手成为生物医学可视化专家。加载此技能后，你的 AI 可以：

- **推荐** 最适合你数据和研究问题的可视化类型
- **生成** 基于 Bizard 教程的可复现 R / Python / Julia 绑图代码
- **搜索** 793 个精选图形示例（使用附带的画廊数据）
- **链接** 到完整教程以获取详细的自定义选项

技能包适用于任何支持自定义指令或知识文件的 AI 工具：

- **ChatGPT / GPT-4**：作为自定义指令 + 知识文件加载
- **Claude**：作为项目文件上传
- **GitHub Copilot Chat**：使用 `#file:skill.md` 引用
- **本地 LLM**（Ollama、LM Studio）：作为系统提示上下文加载

::: callout-tip
**快速开始**：下载下方 ZIP 包 → 将 `skill.md` 加载为 AI 指令 → 上传 `gallery_data.csv` 作为知识文件 → 提问：*"帮我为差异表达结果创建一个火山图"*
:::

---

## 下载技能包 {#download}

ZIP 包含：

- **`skill.md`** — AI 技能指令：教会你的 AI 助手如何使用 Bizard 进行可视化推荐和代码生成
- **`gallery_data.csv`** — 793 个可视化示例，包含图片 URL、教程链接、描述和分类
- **`gallery_data_zh.csv`** — 画廊数据的中文版本
- **`README.md`** — 不同 AI 工具的安装指南

```{=html}
<div style="text-align:center;margin:2rem 0;">
  <a class="bizard-skill-dl" href="bizard-skill.zip" download
    style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3a86ff,#2563eb);color:#fff;border:none;padding:1rem 2.5rem;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(58,134,255,.3);transition:transform .15s,box-shadow .15s;"
    onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-2px)';this.style.boxShadow='0 6px 20px rgba(58,134,255,.4)'"
    onmouseout="this.style.transform='none';this.style.boxShadow='0 4px 14px rgba(58,134,255,.3)'">
    ⬇️ 下载 Bizard 技能 ZIP
  </a>
</div>
<script>
// Fix download link paths for pages served under subdirectories (e.g. zh/)
(function() {
  var parts = window.location.pathname.replace(/\/+$/, '').split('/');
  var segmentsAfterRoot = Math.max(0, parts.length - 3);
  var prefix = '';
  for (var i = 0; i < segmentsAfterRoot; i++) prefix += '../';
  if (!prefix) prefix = './';
  document.querySelectorAll('a.bizard-skill-dl, a[href="bizard-skill.zip"], a[href$="/bizard-skill.zip"]').forEach(function(a) {
    a.href = prefix + 'bizard-skill.zip';
  });
})();
</script>
```

---

## 按分类浏览技能 {#browse}

使用搜索框、语言筛选或点击分类来浏览所有可用的可视化技能。

```{=html}
<div id="skills-browser" style="margin-bottom:2rem;">
  <div style="display:flex;gap:.6rem;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;margin-bottom:1rem;">
    <input id="skill-search" type="text" placeholder="搜索技能…" oninput="filterSkills()"
      style="flex:1;min-width:200px;padding:.5rem .8rem;font-size:.95rem;border:1px solid #ccc;border-radius:6px;font-family:inherit;">
    <div id="lang-filters" style="display:flex;gap:.3rem;flex-wrap:wrap;"></div>
    <div id="cat-filters" style="display:flex;gap:.3rem;flex-wrap:wrap;"></div>
  </div>
  <div id="skills-count" style="font-size:.85rem;color:#666;margin-bottom:.5rem;"></div>
  <div id="skills-grid" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(240px,1fr));gap:.8rem;"></div>

  <div id="skill-modal" style="display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.45);z-index:9999;overflow-y:auto;padding:2rem 1rem;">
    <div style="max-width:720px;margin:auto;background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:1.8rem 2rem;position:relative;">
      <button onclick="document.getElementById('skill-modal').style.display='none'"
        style="position:absolute;top:1rem;right:1rem;background:#f0f0f0;border:none;border-radius:4px;padding:.3rem .7rem;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;">✕</button>
      <h3 id="modal-title" style="margin-top:0;"></h3>
      <div style="margin-bottom:.6rem;">
        <span id="modal-category" style="font-size:.8rem;padding:.2rem .6rem;border-radius:12px;color:#fff;font-weight:600;"></span>
        <span id="modal-lang" style="font-size:.8rem;padding:.2rem .6rem;border-radius:12px;color:#fff;font-weight:600;margin-left:.3rem;"></span>
      </div>
      <pre id="modal-content" style="background:#f7f7f7;padding:1rem;border-radius:6px;font-size:.82rem;overflow-x:auto;white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:55vh;overflow-y:auto;"></pre>
      <div style="margin-top:1rem;display:flex;gap:.6rem;flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <button onclick="copySkill()" style="background:#3a86ff;color:#fff;border:none;padding:.5rem 1.1rem;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">📋 复制技能</button>
        <a id="modal-tutorial-link" href="#" target="_blank" style="background:#06d6a0;color:#fff;border:none;padding:.5rem 1.1rem;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;">📖 打开教程</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
let ALL_SKILLS = [];
let activeCat = 'All';
let activeLang = 'All';
const CAT_COLORS = {
  Distribution:"#4361ee",Correlation:"#7209b7",Ranking:"#f72585",
  Composition:"#4cc9f0",Proportion:"#560bad",DataOverTime:"#3a0ca3",
  Animation:"#4895ef",Omics:"#e63946",Clinics:"#2a9d8f",Hiplot:"#e9c46a",
  Python:"#3776AB",Julia:"#9558B2",Misc:"#999"
};
const LANG_COLORS = {R:"#276BBE",Python:"#3776AB",Julia:"#9558B2"};

fetch('skills/index.json')
  .then(r => r.ok ? r.json() : [])
  .catch(() => [])
  .then(data => { ALL_SKILLS = data; renderAll(); });

function renderAll() {
  const langs = [...new Set(ALL_SKILLS.map(s => s.language || 'R'))].sort();
  const langDiv = document.getElementById('lang-filters');
  langDiv.innerHTML = '<button onclick="setLang(\'All\')" class="lang-btn active" style="padding:.3rem .7rem;border:1px solid #ccc;border-radius:15px;background:#333;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:.8rem;">全部语言</button>';
  langs.forEach(l => {
    langDiv.innerHTML += `<button onclick="setLang('${l}')" class="lang-btn" style="padding:.3rem .7rem;border:1px solid ${LANG_COLORS[l]||'#999'};border-radius:15px;background:transparent;color:${LANG_COLORS[l]||'#999'};cursor:pointer;font-size:.8rem;">${l}</button>`;
  });
  const cats = [...new Set(ALL_SKILLS.map(s => s.category))].sort();
  const catDiv = document.getElementById('cat-filters');
  catDiv.innerHTML = '<button onclick="setCat(\'All\')" class="cat-btn active" style="padding:.3rem .7rem;border:1px solid #ccc;border-radius:15px;background:#333;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:.8rem;">全部</button>';
  cats.forEach(c => {
    catDiv.innerHTML += `<button onclick="setCat('${c}')" class="cat-btn" style="padding:.3rem .7rem;border:1px solid ${CAT_COLORS[c]||'#999'};border-radius:15px;background:transparent;color:${CAT_COLORS[c]||'#999'};cursor:pointer;font-size:.8rem;">${c}</button>`;
  });
  filterSkills();
}

function setLang(l) {
  activeLang = l;
  document.querySelectorAll('.lang-btn').forEach(b => {
    const txt = b.textContent.trim();
    const isActive = txt === (l==='All'?'全部语言':l);
    b.style.background = isActive ? '#333' : 'transparent';
    b.style.color = isActive ? '#fff' : (LANG_COLORS[txt]||'#999');
  });
  filterSkills();
}

function setCat(c) {
  activeCat = c;
  document.querySelectorAll('.cat-btn').forEach(b => {
    const txt = b.textContent;
    const isActive = txt === (c==='All'?'全部':c);
    b.style.background = isActive ? '#333' : 'transparent';
    b.style.color = isActive ? '#fff' : (CAT_COLORS[txt]||'#999');
  });
  filterSkills();
}

function filterSkills() {
  const q = (document.getElementById('skill-search').value || '').toLowerCase();
  const filtered = ALL_SKILLS.filter(s => {
    if (activeCat !== 'All' && s.category !== activeCat) return false;
    if (activeLang !== 'All' && (s.language||'R') !== activeLang) return false;
    if (q && !s.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) && !s.category.toLowerCase().includes(q) && !(s.use_when||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)) return false;
    return true;
  });
  document.getElementById('skills-count').textContent = `显示 ${filtered.length} / ${ALL_SKILLS.length} 个技能`;
  const grid = document.getElementById('skills-grid');
  grid.innerHTML = filtered.map((s, i) => `
    <div onclick="showSkill(${ALL_SKILLS.indexOf(s)})" style="border:1px solid #e0e0e0;border-radius:8px;padding:1rem;cursor:pointer;transition:box-shadow .2s;border-left:4px solid ${CAT_COLORS[s.category]||'#999'}"
      onmouseover="this.style.boxShadow='0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.12)'" onmouseout="this.style.boxShadow='none'">
      <div style="font-weight:600;font-size:.95rem;margin-bottom:.3rem;">${s.name}</div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:.3rem;margin-bottom:.4rem;">
        <span style="font-size:.7rem;padding:.15rem .5rem;border-radius:10px;background:${CAT_COLORS[s.category]||'#999'};color:#fff;">${s.category}</span>
        <span style="font-size:.7rem;padding:.15rem .5rem;border-radius:10px;background:${LANG_COLORS[s.language||'R']||'#999'};color:#fff;">${s.language||'R'}</span>
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#666;line-height:1.3;">${(s.use_when||'').substring(0,100)}${(s.use_when||'').length>100?'…':''}</div>
    </div>
  `).join('');
}

function showSkill(idx) {
  const s = ALL_SKILLS[idx];
  document.getElementById('modal-title').textContent = s.name;
  const catSpan = document.getElementById('modal-category');
  catSpan.textContent = s.category;
  catSpan.style.background = CAT_COLORS[s.category] || '#999';
  const langSpan = document.getElementById('modal-lang');
  langSpan.textContent = s.language || 'R';
  langSpan.style.background = LANG_COLORS[s.language||'R'] || '#999';
  document.getElementById('modal-tutorial-link').href = s.tutorial_url;
  document.getElementById('skill-modal').style.display = 'block';

  const preview = `# Skill: ${s.name} (${s.language||'R'})\n\n## Category\n${s.category}\n\n## When to Use\n${s.use_when}\n\n## Required Packages\n${s.packages.length ? s.packages.map(p=>'- '+p).join('\n') : '(see tutorial)'}\n\n## Full Tutorial\n${s.tutorial_url}`;
  document.getElementById('modal-content').textContent = preview;

  if (s.skill_file) {
    fetch(s.skill_file)
      .then(r => r.ok ? r.text() : null)
      .catch(() => null)
      .then(text => {
        if (text) document.getElementById('modal-content').textContent = text;
      });
  }
}

function copySkill() {
  const text = document.getElementById('modal-content').textContent;
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(() => {
    const btn = event.target;
    btn.textContent = '✅ 已复制!';
    setTimeout(() => btn.textContent = '📋 复制技能', 2000);
  });
}
</script>
```

---

## 下载资源

- **[下载技能 ZIP 包](bizard-skill.zip)** — 完整的统一技能包
- **[`skills/index.json`](skills/index.json)** — 轻量级 JSON 索引
- **[`skills/bizard_skills.json`](skills/bizard_skills.json)** — 完整技能文档

## 重新生成技能

技能在教程更新到主分支时**自动重新生成**。手动重新生成：

```bash
# LLM 模式（需要配置 API 密钥）
python .github/scripts/generate_skills.py --format both --verbose

# 离线模式（基于规则提取）
python .github/scripts/generate_skills.py --offline --format both --verbose
```

统一的 `skill.md` 在每次生成技能时从技能索引自动重建。

查看完整技术规范：[技能生成规范](https://github.com/openbiox/Bizard/blob/main/skill-spec.md)。
